category_sources: source_facts.description says it is like pigz; official GitHub README says crabz is a cross-platform compression/decompression tool supporting gzip/zlib/BGZF/snap: https://github.com/sstadick/crabz#readme

docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface and includes synopsis, install, usage, and benchmarks: https://github.com/sstadick/crabz#readme
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/sstadick/crabz, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
